allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\(''type''\) == ''human'': msg = obj.get\(''message'', {}\) if isinstance\(msg, dict\): content = msg.get\(''content'', ''''\) if isinstance\(content, str\) and \(''あゆみ'' in content or ''愛され'' in content\): print\(content[:3000]\) print\(''---END---''\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json with open\(''/Users/deguchishouma/.claude/projects/-Users-deguchishouma-team-info/fb87c812-50ad-4e7f-8dde-cf9f0ce42c0a.jsonl''\) as f: for line in f: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\(''type''\) == ''human'': msg = obj.get\(''message'', {}\) if isinstance\(msg, dict\): content = msg.get\(''content'', ''''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for item in content: if isinstance\(item, dict\) and item.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': text = item.get\(''text'', ''''\) if ''あゆみ'' in text or ''愛され'' in text or ''ayumi'' in text: print\(text[:3000]\) print\(''===END===''\) ")
